qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: What is printed by the following program? #include<stdio.h> int main(int argc, char *argv[]) { int x = 1, z[2] = {10, 11}; int *p = NULL; p = &x; *p = 10; p = &z[1]; *(&z[0] + 1) += 3; printf("%d, %d, %d\n", x, z[0], z[1]); return 0;

qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: What is the output of the following program? #include <stdio.h> int main() { double a[2]={20.0,25.0},* p,* q; p=a ; q=p+1 ; printf("%d,%d", (int) (q-p),( int)(* q- * p)); return 0;} A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: #include <stdio.h> void foo(int *p, int x) { *p=x; } int main(){ int *z; int a = 20, b = 25; z = &a; foo(z,b); printf("%d",a); return 0; } The output of the given program is __________. (Answer in integer)
